mapper.sql: id, program_group_id, prime, area_id, program_category_id, parent_program_category_id, title, actor, place, item_picture, pre_sell, pre_sell_instruction, important_notice, detail, per_order_limit_purchase_count, per_account_limit_purchase_count, refund_ticket_rule, delivery_instruction, entry_rule, child_purchase, invoice_specification, real_ticket_purchase_rule, abnormal_order_description, kind_reminder, performance_duration, entry_time, min_performance_count, main_actor, min_performance_duration, prohibited_item, deposit_specification, total_count, permit_refund, refund_explain, rel_name_ticket_entrance, rel_name_ticket_entrance_explain, permit_choose_seat, choose_seat_explain, electronic_delivery_ticket, electronic_delivery_ticket_explain, electronic_invoice, electronic_invoice_explain, high_heat, program_status, issue_time, create_time, edit_time, status
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO d_program_category (parent_id, name, type, create_time, edit_time, status) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{name}, #{type}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id, name, type, create_time, edit_time, status FROM d_program_category WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
SELECT id, parent_id, name, type, create_time, edit_time, status FROM d_program_category WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY parent_id ASC, type ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO d_program_group (program_json, recent_show_time, create_time, edit_time, status) VALUES (#{programJson}, #{recentShowTime}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{status})

INSERT INTO d_program (program_group_id, prime, area_id, program_category_id, parent_program_category_id, title, actor, place, item_picture, pre_sell, pre_sell_instruction, important_notice, detail, per_order_limit_purchase_count, per_account_limit_purchase_count, refund_ticket_rule, delivery_instruction, entry_rule, child_purchase, invoice_specification, real_ticket_purchase_rule, abnormal_order_description, kind_reminder, performance_duration, entry_time, min_performance_count, main_actor, min_performance_duration, prohibited_item, deposit_specification, total_count, permit_refund, refund_explain, rel_name_ticket_entrance, rel_name_ticket_entrance_explain, permit_choose_seat, choose_seat_explain, electronic_delivery_ticket, electronic_delivery_ticket_explain, electronic_invoice, electronic_invoice_explain, high_heat, program_status, issue_time, create_time, edit_time, status) VALUES (#{programGroupId}, #{prime}, #{areaId}, #{programCategoryId}, #{parentProgramCategoryId}, #{title}, #{actor}, #{place}, #{itemPicture}, #{preSell}, #{preSellInstruction}, #{importantNotice}, #{detail}, #{perOrderLimitPurchaseCount}, #{perAccountLimitPurchaseCount}, #{refundTicketRule}, #{deliveryInstruction}, #{entryRule}, #{childPurchase}, #{invoiceSpecification}, #{realTicketPurchaseRule}, #{abnormalOrderDescription}, #{kindReminder}, #{performanceDuration}, #{entryTime}, #{minPerformanceCount}, #{mainActor}, #{minPerformanceDuration}, #{prohibitedItem}, #{depositSpecification}, #{totalCount}, #{permitRefund}, #{refundExplain}, #{relNameTicketEntrance}, #{relNameTicketEntranceExplain}, #{permitChooseSeat}, #{chooseSeatExplain}, #{electronicDeliveryTicket}, #{electronicDeliveryTicketExplain}, #{electronicInvoice}, #{electronicInvoiceExplain}, #{highHeat}, #{programStatus}, #{issueTime}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM d_program WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1 AND program_status = 1
SELECT id FROM d_program WHERE status = 1 AND program_status = 1 ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT tc.program_id, MIN(tc.price) AS min_price, MAX(tc.price) AS max_price FROM d_ticket_category tc INNER JOIN d_program p ON p.id = tc.program_id WHERE tc.status = 1 AND p.status = 1 AND p.program_status = 1 GROUP BY tc.program_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO d_program_show_time (program_id, show_time, show_day_time, show_week_time, area_id, create_time, edit_time, status) VALUES (#{programId}, #{showTime}, #{showDayTime}, #{showWeekTime}, #{areaId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, program_id, show_time, show_day_time, show_week_time, area_id, create_time, edit_time, status FROM d_program_show_time WHERE program_id = #{programId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY show_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO d_ticket_category (program_id, introduce, price, total_number, remain_number, create_time, edit_time, status) VALUES (#{programId}, #{introduce}, #{price}, #{totalNumber}, #{remainNumber}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, program_id, introduce, price, total_number, remain_number, create_time, edit_time, status FROM d_ticket_category WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
SELECT id, program_id, introduce, price, total_number, remain_number, create_time, edit_time, status FROM d_ticket_category WHERE program_id = #{programId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY price ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO d_seat (program_id, ticket_category_id, row_code, col_code, seat_type, price, sell_status, create_time, edit_time, status) VALUES
(#{seat.programId}, #{seat.ticketCategoryId}, #{seat.rowCode}, #{seat.colCode}, #{seat.seatType}, #{seat.price}, #{seat.sellStatus}, #{seat.createdAt}, #{seat.updatedAt}, #{seat.status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, program_id, ticket_category_id, row_code, col_code, seat_type, price, sell_status, create_time, edit_time, status FROM d_seat WHERE program_id = #{programId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY row_code ASC, col_code ASC
